page: Microsoft Azure EC96ads_v5 is a memory-optimized server instance belonging to the ECADSv5 family. It is powered by an AMD processor with an x86_64 architecture, delivering 96 dedicated vCPUs. The underlying virtualization is managed by the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, ensuring dedicated resource allocation for compute-intensive and memory-heavy tasks.

The instance is equipped with 672.0 GB of system memory, which yields a ratio of 7.0 GB of RAM per core. For storage-heavy operations, it includes 3686 GB of local storage and supports Premium Storage options. This configuration does not include any graphics processing units or complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

This server type is designed for resource-intensive workloads that benefit from high memory density and local storage capacity. It is appropriate for hosting large relational databases, enterprise resource planning systems, data warehousing, and transactional processing applications where high memory-to-CPU ratios are required.
description: Microsoft Azure EC96ads_v5 is a memory-optimized server instance powered by an AMD x86_64 processor with 96 dedicated vCPUs under the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features a substantial memory capacity of 672.0 GB, translating to 7.0 GB of RAM per core, which supports memory-intensive operations. For storage, the instance is equipped with 3686 GB of local disk space and is Premium Storage capable, enabling high-throughput data access. It does not include integrated GPUs or complimentary public IPv4 addresses. This hardware profile is qualitatively cost-efficient for workloads requiring high memory density and local storage capacity without GPU acceleration. The EC96ads_v5 is designed for large-scale databases, enterprise applications, data warehousing, and transactional processing systems.

tagline: A high-capacity memory-optimized instance featuring ninety-six dedicated cores and extensive local storage for demanding enterprise database workloads.
